description: Use this API to uniformly increase or decrease the line resistances of in-service nontransformer branches. It must first be called once with APIOPT set to 1, then once for each subsystem to be processed with APIOPT set to 2, and finally once with APIOPT set to 3. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, nchng = modr(sid, all, apiopt, irat, rload, fmax)
python_syntax: ierr, nchng = modr(sid, all, apiopt, irat, rload, fmax)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid subsystem identifier. valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. subsystem sid must have been previously defined. (input; used only when APIOPT is 2; 0 by default).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified subsystem flag. (input; used only when APIOPT is 2; 1 by default).

parameters.name: apiopt
parameters.description: Mode of operation of the api. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: irat
parameters.description: Rating set on which the present values of branch resistances are based. (input; used only when APIOPT is 1; default rating set program option setting by default).

parameters.name: rload
parameters.description: Base line loading in percent. 0.0001 < rload < 2000.0. (input; used only when APIOPT is 1; 100.0 by default).

parameters.name: fmax
parameters.description: Line resistance scaling factor in pu 0.0 < fmax < 0.1. (input; used only when APIOPT is 1; 0.01 by default).

return_values.name: nchng
return_values.description: Returned as the number of branch resistances changed. (output).

all.description: process only buses in subsystem SID.

apiopt.description: initialize system for line resistance modification.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
